product.title: Summer Fridays Sheer Skin Tint - Skin Tint with Hyaluronic Acid - Helps Diminish Uneven Skin Tone - Sheer to Light Coverage - Shade 1 - Fair with Neutral Peach Undertones (1 Fl Oz)

primaryFeatures.color: Shade 01 - Fair with Neutral Peach Undertones

featureBullets: Award-Winning Formula - Our lightweight skin tint adds a touch of sheer color - providing a more even, healthy appearance while infusing skin with hydration. Its weightless, fluid formula helps diminish the look of redness, pores and uneven skin tone, while giving you an effortless, natural makeup look.

Key Ingredients - Squalane, Vitamin E, Safflower Oil and Avocado Oil lock in hydration and help the formula glide evenly over skin. Antioxidant-rich Tiger Grass helps soothe the skin and reduce the appearance of redness.
Hydrating, Dewy Finish - A humectant blend of Glycerin and Hyaluronic Acid helps attract and hold water on skin's surface to plump fine lines and support a healthy moisture barrier.
How to Use - Shake well before using. Smooth the face makeup in the AM after your daily skincare and SPF products. Lightweight formula can be layered if more coverage is desired.

Welcome to the world of Summer Fridays. Gently effective skincare and hybrid-makeup essentials that make routines feel effortless and skin look luminous. Formulated to optimize skin and beauty, please the mind and bring ease and softness to everyday life.

specification.value: #15,485 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #25 in Facial Tinted Moisturizers
Shade 01 - Fair with Neutral Peach Undertones

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers love this skin tint for its natural radiant look and perfect coverage that's buildable. They appreciate its lightweight feel, silky texture that feels like their own skin, and moisturizing properties that keep skin hydrated throughout the day. The product lasts all day and is suitable for daily wear, with one customer noting it's particularly good for no-makeup makeup looks. While some customers find it non-greasy, others mention it's not great for oily skin.

reviews.reviewText: I really like this product! I was looking for a skin tint that was lightweight and not too full coverage, and this was both. It wore good throughout the day, every other time I've tried a skin tint it would cause flaking from dryness and this one didn't after a full 12 hour day. Not oily but still gives a nice glow. I applied with a brush and I'm not into makeup so very easy application! It also did not make me break out which is key. Overall I recommend!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Sensitive skin approved---My 6th Bottle for a Reason
reviews.reviewText: This is my favorite skin tint and my everyday go-to. I have sensitive skin, and this doesn’t make me break out at all. I’m currently on my 6th bottle, which honestly says everything. I’m extremely picky about skincare and makeup, and my skin is allergic to basically everything. It reacts to products like it’s personally offended, so finding something that doesn’t piss my skin off feels like a small miracle. I’m 38, and this does not make my skin look dry or emphasize pores or fine lines. The finish is honestly so pretty — a natural, healthy glow that still looks like skin. I rarely use full foundation anymore. I might pull it out for a special event, but most days I grab this instead because it sits so well on my skin, looks amazing in photos, and other products blend beautifully on top of it. It also doesn’t feel heavy at all — you forget you’re wearing anything. With the right skin prep and a setting spray, it’s long-lasting, and a little truly goes a long way. One bottle easily lasts me 3+ months, sometimes longer. No complaints. Just a really solid skin tint that my extremely picky, sensitive skin actually likes — which is rare.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 4, 2026

productSpecs.color: Shade 04 - Light-Medium with Neutral Olive Undertones

reviews.reviewText: Love this sheer tint! It feels really good on my skin, blends easily, and the shade is perfect for a natural look. Definitely worth the price for how lightweight and comfortable it is. The only downside is I wish it had a bit more coverage for spots and under the eyes.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 8, 2026

productSpecs.color: Shade 04 - Light-Medium with Neutral Olive Undertones

reviews.reviewText: I like it! I have super hormonal, acne-prone skin and it hasn’t broken me out in any noticeable way. The coverage is LIGHTTTT especially if you wear it for hours on end. By the end of a six hour shift, it doesn’t really cover anything and it does pill depending on what you put under/over it. But it DOES even out my skin tone and feels good on the skin. It’s super dewy so no matte finish here.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 10, 2025

productSpecs.color: Shade 04 - Light-Medium with Neutral Olive Undertones

reviews.reviewTitle: Great for two tone hyperpigmentation skin
reviews.reviewText: I don’t wear makeup but have hyperpigmentation spots on my face I haven’t been able to get rid of. What I like about this product is that it is super light and you can spot cover without it looking like it needs to be fully saturated on face . Really good after my skin routine and sun screen as it stays well and doesn’t smear on everything. What made me try it is I received a sample from a family member and really liked how it looked, so I purchased it full. Very nice product!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 3, 2025

reviews.reviewText: #6 is a perfect match for Carmel colored skin. Looks very natural not like foundation but blurs imperfection for even coloring. The price seems high for a small size, but not much is needed to apply.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 12, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I've got super sensitive skin and this made me break out with acne, even when I mixed it with my moisturizer. I gave it to my daughter and she seemed to do okay with it, though. I usually use Drunk Elephant's bronzing drops, but I wanted to try something without shimmer. I'll stick with Drunk Elephant and skip the acne!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2025
